name: StoreFeeConfig
description: StoreFeeConfig schema from Flipdish API - Stores.

PercentFeeTips.description: Gets or sets the percent fee tips.

PercentFeeTipsCollection.description: Gets or sets the percent fee tips for collection.

PercentFeeTipsDelivery.description: Gets or sets the percent fee tips for delivery.

TaxRatePercent.description: Gets or sets the tax rate percent.

PercentFeeCardOrdersLocationService.description: Gets or sets the percent fee card orders location service.

PercentFeeCashOrdersLocationService.description: Gets or sets the percent fee cash orders location service.

FixedFeeCardOrdersLocationService.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee card orders location service.

FixedFeeCashOrdersLocationService.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee cash orders location service.

PercentFeeCardOrdersLocationServiceCharg.description: Gets or sets the percent fee card orders location service charged to customer including vat.

PercentFeeCashOrdersLocationServiceCharg.description: Gets or sets the percent fee cash orders location service charged to customer including vat.

FixedFeeCardOrdersLocationServiceCharged.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee card orders location service charged to customer including vat.

FixedFeeCashOrdersLocationServiceCharged.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee cash orders location service charged to customer including vat.

PercentFeeCardOrdersIngest.description: Gets or sets the percent fee card orders ingest.

PercentFeeCashOrdersIngest.description: Gets or sets the percent fee cash orders ingest.

FixedFeeCardOrdersIngest.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee card orders ingest.

FixedFeeCashOrdersIngest.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee cash orders ingest.

PercentFeeDelivery.description: Gets or sets the percent fee for delivery orders.

FixedFeeDelivery.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee for delivery orders.

PercentFeeCardPosTransaction.description: Gets or sets the percent fee for POS transactions.

FixedFeeCardPosTransaction.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee for POS transactions.

PercentFeeOrderWithGoogle.description: Additional percentage fee charged on orders submitted through Order With Google

FixedFeeOrderWithGoogle.description: Additional fixed fee charged on orders submitted through Order With Google

ShouldNotAutoIncreaseBefore.description: Should not auto increase fees before this date

Reason.description: Reason for the last fee change (optional)

PercentFeeCardOrdersPhoneAgent.description: Gets or sets the percent fee card orders phone agent.

PercentFeeCashOrdersPhoneAgent.description: Gets or sets the percent fee cash orders phone agent.

FixedFeeCardOrdersPhoneAgent.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee card orders phone agent.

FixedFeeCashOrdersPhoneAgent.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee cash orders phone agent.

PercentFeeCardOrdersPhoneAgentChargedToC.description: Gets or sets the percent fee card orders phone agent charged to customer including vat.

PercentFeeCashOrdersPhoneAgentChargedToC.description: Gets or sets the percent fee cash orders phone agent charged to customer including vat.

FixedFeeCardOrdersPhoneAgentChargedToCus.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee card orders phone agent charged to customer including vat.

FixedFeeCashOrdersPhoneAgentChargedToCus.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee cash orders phone agent charged to customer including vat.
